/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/virtual_remote_server.dir/src/server_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_remote_server.dir/src/udp_receiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_remote_server.dir/src/virtual_gamepad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_remote_server.dir/src/controller_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_remote_server.dir/src/discovery_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/virtual_remote_server.dir/src/tcp_feedback_server.cpp.o -o virtual_remote_server
